Files written:
- `/worksp/popdam/src/components/library/LibraryTopBar.tsx` — fully rewritten with the new unified bar layout
- `/worksp/popdam/src/pages/Index.tsx` — added `cardStyle` state and the three new props (`cardStyle`, `onCardStyleChange`, `groupCount`, `fileCount`) to the `LibraryTopBar` usage

Key design decisions:
- All styling uses inline styles with `var(--pd-*)` tokens as specified; no shadcn Button/Badge/Select/Input used in the new design
- Sort dropdown and card-layout dropdown are custom controlled `<div>` panels with `useOutsideClick` (no Popover dependency needed)
- Mode-switch sort reset is handled via `useEffect` watching `libraryMode`; invalid sort fields fall back to `modified_at`
- The sync button is icon-only (RefreshCw) with tooltip, positioned before the view segmented control
- `onStopScan`, `onRefresh`, `lastScanStatus`, `lastScanTime`, `lastScanSummary` remain in the props interface (kept for backward compat / callers) but the toolbar no longer renders the old scan status badges — those belong in the header sync pill / `ScanMonitorBanner`

The file is complete and TypeScript-clean. Here is a summary of what was written:

/worksp/popdam/src/components/AppHeader.tsx — complete replacement with:

- 56px sticky header using `var(--pd-hdr-bg)` background, `blur(14px)` backdrop, `var(--pd-border)` bottom border
- Brand lockup: 26x26 rounded square with `linear-gradient(140deg, var(--pd-accent), var(--pd-accent-hov))` + `Layers` icon, followed by wordmark with the "DAM"/"SG" suffix in `var(--pd-accent)` bold
- `DesktopNav` component using `useLocation()` for active detection — avoids render-prop TS issues; active links get `var(--pd-accent-soft)` background + `var(--pd-accent-soft-fg)` color + weight 600
- Mobile sheet nav preserved (uses existing `NavLink` wrapper)
- `SyncPill`: rounded-full pill with `var(--pd-surface)` bg / `var(--pd-border)` border; green dot + "Synced" + time-ago when online, amber pulsing dot + "Syncing…" when scanning, red dot + "Offline" when offline/none. Popover shows `AgentDetail` cards + Sync now / Diagnostics link
- `AppearanceButton`: sun/moon icon-only bordered button opening a popover with Light/Dark segmented control and 4 color swatches (Indigo/Teal/Amber/Rose); calls `useAppearance()` internally
- Notifications bell (icon-only bordered button)
- Avatar: 30px circle with `var(--pd-accent-soft)` bg / `var(--pd-accent-soft-fg)` text, shows initials or AvatarImage
- All existing functionality preserved: impersonation banner, user dropdown with impersonate sub-menu, sign out, mobile hamburger, build stamp

No TypeScript errors. The file is at `/worksp/popdam/src/components/library/StyleGroupListView.tsx`.

Key implementation details:

- CSS grid `"52px 1fr minmax(140px,220px) minmax(100px,150px) 50px"` shared between header and rows via constants
- `Thumbnail`: 52x40px, border-radius 6px, real image or hue-based gradient (from sku char hash) with initials overlay
- `WfTag`: colored pill per workflow status using pd-token CSS vars with sensible HSL fallbacks
- `Row` is a separate component to isolate hover state (`useState`)
- Selected rows get `--pd-accent-soft` bg; hover gets `--pd-surface` + border-radius
- Category column shows `product_category` text + Lic/Gen pill with `--pd-licensed-soft`/`--pd-licensed` or `--pd-surface-3`/`--pd-fg-muted`
- Files column: mono, right-aligned, pd-fg-muted; shows `…` when stats pending
- Header is `position: sticky; top: 0` with `--pd-surface-2` bg and `--pd-border` bottom border
- All color tokens use CSS var with HSL fallbacks so they degrade gracefully if tokens are absent

No errors related to AssetGrid. The file is written at `/worksp/popdam/src/components/library/AssetGrid.tsx`.

Key implementation notes:
- File-type badge: top-left, colored with the oklch palette per spec (`psd`=purple, `ai`=orange, etc.)

- `formatFileSize` handles B/KB/MB/GB formatting
- Loading state: 12 animated pulse skeleton cards
- Grid: `minmax(208px, 1fr)` auto-fill
- Context menu and checkout/folder logic preserved from original

No type errors. The file is at `/worksp/popdam/src/components/library/AssetListView.tsx`.

Key implementation decisions:
- Replaced the `<Table>` component with a CSS grid (`gridTemplateColumns: "40px 1.8fr 1.2fr .7fr .7fr"`) to match the exact spec column widths
- `FileTypeBadge` renders a 36x28px rounded-6px badge with hardcoded colors: PSD=purple `#7c3aed`, AI=orange `#ea580c`, PNG=teal `#0d9488`, PDF=red `#dc2626`, JPG=blue `#2563eb`, TIF=violet (same as PSD)
- "superseded" label is derived from `workflow_status === "discontinued"` (the closest available enum value); everything else shows "current version"
- Style group column shows `sku` on top in mono 11.5px, then `property_name · licensor_name` below in `pd-fg-muted`
- Modified column uses an inline `relativeTime()` helper (no external dep) showing `Xm/h/d/mo/y ago`
- Size uses `formatSize()` covering B/KB/MB/GB
- Row hover/selected uses `hover:bg-muted/40` and `bg-primary/10` matching StyleGroupListView pattern

No TypeScript errors. The implementation is clean.

/worksp/popdam/src/components/library/StyleGroupDetailPanel.tsx

The redesigned panel:

- **Panel**: 408px wide, flex-col layout, border-left, slides in via `sgdp-slide-in` CSS keyframe (0.26s cubic-bezier(.22,.61,.36,1)), respects `prefers-reduced-motion`.

- **Hero (16:10)**: Full-width image or hue-based gradient with SKU initials. Top-left: Licensed/Generic glass badge. Top-right: glass close button. Bottom-left: category+stage glass badge. Carousel arrows if multiple thumbnails.

- **Title block**: Mono SKU (13px/600), ERP description or SKU as property name (19px/800), workflow tag + "Category · Stage" subline (12.5px, muted).

- **Sticky tabs**: Overview | Files · N | Activity — active tab gets `pd-accent`-colored 2px underline, 600 weight.

- **Overview tab**: DETAILS section (dl/dt/dd with right-aligned dd), editable Workflow select, LOCATION mono path block in `pd-surface-2` bg, path copy rows, TAGS with add/remove/sync, AI Analysis, File Dates, Production POs, Style Guide Sources, Folder, and Find Alternative Images — all real data preserved.

- **Files tab**: Each file gets a colored 36x36 type tile (matching AssetGrid colors: orange=AI, blue=PSD, red=PDF, etc.), mono filename, size, "preview ready"/"no preview", optional "superseded" badge, download icon button. Context menu preserved.

- **Activity tab**: Vertical timeline (border-l + absolute dots) showing creation, auto-sync, stage, AI tagged, file modified events.

- **Footer**: "Download all" accent button (flex-1), Share icon (copies URL), Open Folder icon — all sticky at bottom.

All existing functional logic (useQuery, mutations, download/checkout, copy paths, open folder URI, AI tagging, tag management, cover selection, FindAlternativeImages) preserved intact.

All 5 edits applied to /worksp/popdam/src/pages/Index.tsx:

1. Added `CardStyle` to the named type import from `@/types/assets` (replacing inline import syntax).
2. Changed `useState<import("@/types/assets").CardStyle>` to `useState<CardStyle>`.
3. Updated `fileCount` in LibraryTopBar to use `groups.reduce((s, g) => s + (g.asset_count || 0), 0)` when in groups mode.
4. Added `cardStyle={cardStyle}` to `StyleGroupGrid`.
5. Added `onOpenGroup` prop to `AssetDetailPanel` that switches to groups mode and sets the detail group ID.
